name: Red Hill Minerals Limited
analysis: EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 55 EMA at A$4.7372. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
